en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 28 – Jul 4 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 442 kcal/day, peaking 823 on Thursday's double (squats + open water). Saturday (Jul 4) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −856 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Saturday (Jul 4) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Thursday doubled up: squats + open water
en.i1: Thursday stacked the squat session (61 min, avg HR 114 / max 153) with a 1.1 km open-water swim in Primošten — 894 active kcal combined, the biggest day of the window.
en.i2t: Four swims kept the aerobic base
en.i2: Two 2.2 km pool interval sets — Monday's 500+8×200 (avg 130 / max 157) and Wednesday's N4×4 (avg 124 / max 162, the week's peak HR) — plus two easy Primošten open-water swims (1.1 km Thu, 1.2 km Fri at avg 98).
en.i3t: Recovery: steady HRV, short last night
en.i3: RHR drifted 52 → 56 across the week and is back to 54 today; HRV settled at 39 after the 50-to-37 swing. Friday night went untracked and last night was short — 5h13 (score 74) off a 00:11 bedtime, though deep sleep was excellent at 1h34.
en.i4: Tuesday's strength and Thursday's squats have no Hevy tonnage yet (volume shows —), and no new per-set HR peaks were appended. The next refresh after Hevy syncs fills both.
en.rec: Saturday is trap-bar deadlift day. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (5h46, ~3,278 active kcal) — two 2.2 km interval swims, Tuesday's strength, Thursday's squats plus a 1.1 km open-water swim, and Friday's easy 1.2 km open water. Recovery is workable but not plush: RHR eased back to 54 and HRV is steady at 39, but last night ran short (5h13, score 74, bed 00:11) despite excellent deep sleep. Lift today with intent — full warm-up, cap the top set, moderate total volume — and bank an early night. Next: Sunday easy (rest/hike/bike), Monday swim intervals per plan. Hevy tonnage for this week's lifts lands on the next refresh.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-28 → 2026-07-04 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 4 plivanja · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 28.6. – 4.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 442 kcal/dan, vrhunac 823 na četvrtkovom dvostrukom (čučnjevi + otvorena voda). Subota (4.7.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −856 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Subota (4.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak je spojio trening čučnja (61 min, prosj. puls 114 / maks 153) s plivanjem 1,1 km na otvorenom u Primoštenu — ukupno 894 aktivne kcal, najveći dan prikazanog tjedna.
hr.i2t: Četiri plivanja držala su aerobnu bazu
hr.i2: Dva bazenska intervala od 2,2 km — ponedjeljkov 500+8×200 (prosj. 130 / maks 157) i srijedin N4×4 (prosj. 124 / maks 162, tjedni vrhunac pulsa) — plus dva lagana plivanja u Primoštenu (1,1 km čet, 1,2 km pet uz prosj. 98).
hr.i3: RHR je kroz tjedan puzao 52 → 56, danas natrag na 54; HRV se smirio na 39 nakon ljuljanja 50 → 37. Noć s petka nije zabilježena, a sinoć je bilo kratko — 5h13 (ocjena 74) uz lijeganje u 00:11, iako je duboki san bio izvrsnih 1h34.
hr.i4: Utorkova snaga i četvrtkovi čučnjevi nemaju Hevy tonažu (volumen prikazuje —), a novi vrhovi pulsa po seriji nisu dodani. Prvi refresh nakon Hevy sinkronizacije popunjava oboje.
hr.rec: Subota je dan trap-bar mrtvog dizanja. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (5h46, ~3.278 aktivnih kcal) — dva bazenska intervala 2,2 km, utorkova snaga, četvrtkovi čučnjevi plus 1,1 km otvorene vode i petkovih laganih 1,2 km. Oporavak je upotrebljiv, ali ne raskošan: RHR se spustio na 54 i HRV je stabilan na 39, no sinoć je bilo kratko (5h13, ocjena 74, lijeganje 00:11) unatoč izvrsnom dubokom snu. Danas diži s namjerom — potpuno zagrijavanje, ograniči završnu seriju, umjeren ukupni volumen — i večeras lezi rano. Sljedeće: nedjelja lagano (odmor/planina/bicikl), ponedjeljak plivački intervali po planu. Hevy tonaža ovotjednih dizanja stiže sa sljedećim refreshom.
hr.foot: Podaci: 28.6. → 4.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
